summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Axes (0..1000 × 0..500). RED curve N/2 = expected classical query count; GREEN curve (π/4)√N = Grover's quantum query count. Right-side table compares 4 N values (100, 10⁴, 10⁶, 10⁹) with classical ~N/2 vs quantum ~(π/4)√N counts. YELLOW bottom caption: quadratic speedup dominates at scale.
